# Strand
> Design tokens + UI components. Zero-runtime CSS. Ship faster.

## Docs
- [README](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/README.md): Install, configure, start building
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/AGENTS.md): AI coding agent usage instructions
- [HTML Reference](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/generated/html-reference.md): CSS class API for every component
- [Design Language](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/docs/design-language.md): Complete design specification
- [Consumers](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/generated/consumers.md): Consumer types and framework parity
- [Strand Lab Page](https://dillingerstaffing.com/labs/strand): Live showcase and brand entry point

## Optional
- [Changelog](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/generated/changelog.md): Version history
- [Contributing](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute
- [Bulma Migration](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/docs/migration/from-bulma.md): Use Strand alongside Bulma
- [Bootstrap Migration](https://github.com/dillingerstaffing/strand/blob/main/docs/migration/from-bootstrap.md): Use Strand alongside Bootstrap
